payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Vertical rectangular brown wooden picture frame with a thin gold inner trim containing a colorful beach-themed print (blue sky, sea and a bird); glass-covered and intact, shown in a narrow edge-cropped vertical crop (top/bottom or sides partially cut off), likely wall-mounted and approximately 1.5 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"picture frame","short_description":"brown wooden beach picture frame","long_description":"Vertical rectangular brown wooden picture frame with a thin gold inner trim containing a colorful beach-themed print (blue sky, sea and a bird); glass-covered and intact, shown in a narrow edge-cropped vertical crop (top/bottom or sides partially cut off), likely wall-mounted and approximately 1.5 m from the camera.","attributes":["brown wooden frame","thin gold inner trim","rectangular vertical orientation","beach-themed print","glass-covered with slight glare","intact condition","edge-cropped/partial view","wall-mounted poster style"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.5}
